treaty_resourcing.notes: Synthetic public demo enables treaty re-sourcing to exercise the U.S. treaty path. VTI here represents an internationally domiciled equity fund (DBA-USA Art. 10 does not reach non-U.S.-source dividends), so it is excluded from Pub. 514 re-sourcing while still being taxed in Germany via InvStG § 20 Teilfreistellung.

fund_classification._note: Per-symbol classifications now live in tax_pipeline/data/german_fund_classification.csv. The demo's VTI is covered by the repo seed; fund_types here is left empty.
